description: Bug-shape → CWE/CAPEC mapping for common Odoo source-code findings. Used by Phase 7/8 to tag findings.

sudo_misuse_idor.label: sudo() bypasses ACL leading to cross-record access

portal_public_route.label: Portal-style route is publicly reachable and needs ownership or token checks

portal_access_token_without_helper.label: Portal route accepts access_token without using Odoo's portal access helper

portal_document_check_missing_token.label: Portal _document_check_access call omits the supplied access_token

portal_sudo_route_id_read.label: Portal route reads URL-selected records through sudo without visible portal access helper

portal_token_exposed_without_check.label: Portal route exposes access_token or access_url data without visible access validation

portal_url_generated_without_check.label: Portal URL is generated without a nearby ownership or token access check

portal_manual_access_token_check.label: Portal route manually compares access_token instead of using Odoo portal access semantics

csrf_state_change_get.label: State-changing route accepts GET / missing methods=['POST']

route_auth_none.label: Odoo route uses auth='none' and bypasses database user authentication

route_bearer_save_session.label: Bearer-authenticated Odoo route explicitly saves a browser session

route_csrf_disabled_all_methods.label: Public Odoo route disables CSRF without restricting HTTP methods

route_unsafe_csrf_disabled.label: Odoo route disables CSRF on a mutating-looking endpoint

route_public_all_methods.label: Public Odoo route does not restrict allowed HTTP methods

route_public_sitemap_indexed.label: Public Odoo website route may be indexed in the sitemap

raw_sql_injection.label: cr.execute with f-string / .format / % concatenation of user input

raw_sql_interpolated_query.label: Runtime cr.execute query is built through interpolation or concatenation

raw_sql_request_derived_input.label: Request-derived data reaches runtime cr.execute query or parameters

raw_sql_broad_destructive_query.label: Runtime cr.execute performs broad destructive SQL without obvious row scoping

raw_sql_write_no_company_scope.label: Runtime UPDATE or DELETE SQL lacks visible multi-company scoping

raw_sql_manual_transaction.label: Runtime code manually commits or rolls back database transactions

deep_with_user_admin.label: Odoo code switches execution to the admin or superuser identity

deep_markup_user_input.label: Odoo code marks request or user-controlled data as trusted HTML

multi_company_missing_check_company.label: Odoo Many2one field lacks check_company enforcement

multi_company_check_company_disabled.label: Odoo field explicitly disables check_company enforcement

multi_company_search_no_company_scope.label: Odoo ORM search lacks visible company scoping

multi_company_sudo_search_no_company_sco.label: Odoo elevated ORM search lacks visible company scoping

multi_company_with_company_user_input.label: Odoo with_company receives request or user-controlled company values

multi_company_context_user_input.label: Odoo company context keys receive request or user-controlled values

multi_company_rule_missing_company_scope.label: Odoo record rule on company-scoped data lacks company restrictions

qweb_dangerous_tag.label: QWeb template renders dangerous script-capable HTML tags

qweb_html_widget_render.label: QWeb renders rich HTML widget content that requires sanitization review

qweb_inline_event_handler.label: QWeb template includes inline JavaScript event handler attributes

qweb_sensitive_field_render.label: QWeb template renders sensitive fields such as tokens, secrets, passwords, or bank data

qweb_dynamic_url_attribute.label: QWeb template binds dynamic URLs into href, src, or action attributes

qweb_dynamic_template_render.label: QWeb t-call chooses a template from dynamic data

qweb_event_handler_injection.label: QWeb dynamic event handler mixes data into JavaScript context

qweb_markup_escape_bypass.label: QWeb t-out/t-esc renders Markup() as trusted HTML

qweb_inline_script_execution.label: QWeb template embeds inline JavaScript or output expressions in JavaScript context

qweb_raw_output_mode.label: QWeb t-out-mode raw disables escaped rendering

i18n_dangerous_html.label: Translation catalog injects dangerous HTML or scriptable URL schemes

i18n_qweb_raw_output.label: Translation catalog injects raw QWeb output directives

i18n_template_expression_injection.label: Translation catalog injects QWeb template expressions or control directives

i18n_placeholder_mismatch.label: Translation catalog changes interpolation placeholders from the reviewed source string

frontend_dom_xss.label: Frontend DOM API writes or parses attacker-controlled HTML

frontend_message_origin_validation.label: Frontend message event handler lacks event.origin validation

frontend_prototype_pollution.label: Frontend object merge allows prototype pollution
frontend_prototype_pollution.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

frontend_unsafe_markup.label: Frontend markup() marks untrusted HTML as safe

frontend_csrf_token_missing.label: Frontend unsafe HTTP request lacks visible CSRF token

frontend_dynamic_orm_service_call.label: Frontend ORM service call uses dynamic model, method, domain, or values

frontend_dynamic_action_window.label: Frontend act_window action uses dynamic model, domain, context, or record selection

frontend_dangerous_url_scheme.label: Frontend or QWeb URL attributes use executable URL schemes

frontend_sensitive_object_url.label: Frontend exposes sensitive values through Blob object URLs

frontend_raw_crypto_key.label: Frontend imports raw or hard-coded cryptographic key material

frontend_sensitive_credential_management.label: Frontend stores sensitive values through browser Credential Management APIs

frontend_sensitive_history_url.label: Frontend persists credential-bearing URLs into browser history

frontend_sensitive_url_exposure.label: Frontend URL, query string, or fragment carries token or secret-like data

frontend_reverse_tabnabbing.label: Frontend link opens a new tab without opener isolation

frontend_iframe_sandbox_missing.label: Frontend iframe embeds content without sandbox restrictions

frontend_iframe_sandbox_escape.label: Frontend iframe sandbox combines script execution with same-origin privileges

frontend_external_script_missing_sri.label: Frontend loads external JavaScript without Subresource Integrity pinning
frontend_external_script_missing_sri.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

frontend_external_stylesheet_missing_sri.label: Frontend loads external CSS without Subresource Integrity pinning
frontend_external_stylesheet_missing_sri.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

frontend_insecure_asset_url.label: Frontend template loads literal insecure HTTP URLs

frontend_dynamic_code_import.label: Frontend imports JavaScript at runtime from external or request-derived module targets
frontend_dynamic_code_import.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

frontend_dynamic_worker_script.label: Frontend starts Worker scripts from external or request-derived script targets
frontend_dynamic_worker_script.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

frontend_dynamic_import_scripts.label: Worker importScripts loads scripts from external or request-derived targets
frontend_dynamic_import_scripts.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

frontend_dynamic_service_worker.label: Frontend registers Service Workers from external or request-derived script targets
frontend_dynamic_service_worker.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

frontend_dynamic_wasm_loading.label: Frontend loads WebAssembly from external or request-derived sources
frontend_dynamic_wasm_loading.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

frontend_dynamic_css_injection.label: Frontend writes request-derived CSS into stylesheet APIs

frontend_dynamic_live_connection.label: Frontend opens WebSocket/EventSource connections to external or request-derived endpoints

frontend_document_domain_relaxation.label: Frontend relaxes same-origin isolation with document.domain

frontend_sensitive_document_cookie.label: Frontend writes sensitive cookies through JavaScript-readable document.cookie

frontend_sensitive_browser_storage.label: Frontend stores sensitive values in browser-controlled storage

frontend_string_code_execution.label: Frontend executes JavaScript from strings or string-built code paths

frontend_sensitive_window_name.label: Frontend stores sensitive values in navigation-persistent window.name

frontend_sensitive_indexeddb_storage.label: Frontend persists sensitive values in IndexedDB object stores

frontend_sensitive_cache_api_storage.label: Frontend persists sensitive requests or responses in the browser Cache API

frontend_sensitive_console_logging.label: Frontend logs sensitive values to the browser console
frontend_sensitive_console_logging.owasp: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

frontend_sensitive_send_beacon.label: Frontend sends sensitive values through navigator.sendBeacon

frontend_sensitive_clipboard_write.label: Frontend writes sensitive values to the system clipboard

frontend_sensitive_notification.label: Frontend displays sensitive values in browser or OS notifications

frontend_sensitive_broadcast_channel.label: Frontend shares sensitive values through BroadcastChannel names or messages

frontend_dynamic_bus_channel.label: Frontend bus service subscribes to dynamic or broad realtime channel

mail_template_html_injection.label: Mail template renders raw or trusted HTML in outbound email

mail_template_token_exposure.label: Mail template can expose or retain tokenized account-access links

mail_template_privileged_rendering.label: Mail template renders content through sudo or superuser context

mail_template_recipient_control.label: Mail template derives sensitive recipients or senders from mutable record data

mail_alias_sensitive_model_ingress.label: Inbound mail alias allows broad senders to create or route messages into sensitive models

mail_alias_broad_sender_policy.label: Inbound mail alias accepts everyone or lacks an explicit sender policy

mail_alias_privileged_defaults.label: Inbound mail alias assigns privileged defaults such as users, groups, sudo, or company fields

mail_alias_dynamic_defaults.label: Inbound mail alias evaluates dynamic alias_defaults code

mail_alias_privileged_owner.label: Inbound mail alias creates or routes messages as an admin or root owner

mail_alias_forced_thread_injection.label: Broad inbound mail alias forces external messages into an existing record thread

mail_chatter_public_notification.label: Public or unauthenticated route posts chatter, creates outbound mail, or sends email

mail_chatter_privileged_notification.label: Chatter or outbound mail notification is sent through sudo or superuser context

mail_chatter_force_send.label: Outbound mail is force-sent synchronously instead of queued

mail_chatter_follower_subscription.label: Chatter follower subscription can expose private record updates to unauthorized recipients

mail_followers_mutation_exposure.label: mail.followers mutation can subscribe unauthorized recipients to private record notifications

mail_chatter_sensitive_content.label: Chatter or outbound mail body includes token, password, secret, or private workflow data

mail_chatter_tainted_content.label: Chatter or outbound mail body includes request-controlled content

mail_chatter_tainted_recipients.label: Chatter or outbound mail recipients are request-controlled

report_privileged_rendering.label: Report rendering bypasses normal record access with sudo

report_sudo_enabled.label: Report action enables report_sudo and may render beyond caller access

report_sudo_render_call.label: Report render call uses sudo or elevated records

report_access_control_exposure.label: Report action or public route can expose sensitive records without sufficient authorization

report_sensitive_no_groups.label: Sensitive model report action lacks groups restriction

report_public_render_route.label: Public route renders a report and must enforce record ownership or tokens

report_cached_document_exposure.label: Report caching or filenames can retain or disclose sensitive document data

report_dynamic_attachment_cache.label: Report caches object-derived attachments that may outlive access changes

report_sensitive_filename_expression.label: Report filename expression includes token, secret, password, or API-key-like data

report_tainted_render_selection.label: Report rendering receives request-controlled records or report action selection

report_tainted_render_records.label: Report rendering receives request-controlled record ids, records, data, or context

report_tainted_render_data.label: Report rendering receives request-controlled data or context options

report_tainted_render_action.label: Report rendering is invoked on a request-controlled report action object

html_sanitizer_relaxed.label: tools.html_sanitize runs with relaxed strict=False policy

field_sensitive_access_control.label: Sensitive model fields lack admin-only group restrictions

field_sensitive_persistence_leak.label: Sensitive field values can leak through indexes, chatter tracking, or record copies

field_compute_sudo_projection.label: Sudo-computed fields can project private data past record rules

field_html_sanitizer_bypass.label: HTML field configuration disables or exposes sanitizer bypass controls

field_binary_database_storage.label: Binary field stores file content in database rows instead of attachment storage

property_field_company_scope.label: Company-dependent property field can fall back across companies or mask missing company-scoped values

property_field_sensitive_access.label: Sensitive company-dependent property field lacks group restrictions

property_record_global_default.label: ir.property default is global instead of company-scoped

property_record_broad_scope.label: ir.property default lacks record/resource scope and may apply broadly

property_sensitive_value.label: ir.property configures sensitive accounting, payment, credential, token, or security values

property_public_mutation.label: Public route mutates ir.property accounting or configuration defaults

property_privileged_mutation.label: ir.property mutation runs through sudo or superuser context

manifest_parse_integrity.label: Odoo manifest cannot be parsed as static literal install metadata

manifest_acl_packaging_gap.label: Installable module defines models but does not load ACL security data

manifest_demo_data_exposure.label: Demo or sample data is shipped through production or application manifest paths

manifest_license_metadata.label: Odoo manifest license metadata is missing or uses an unexpected identifier

manifest_auto_install_security.label: auto_install manifest posture can implicitly load security data or activate unexpectedly

manifest_remote_asset_supply_chain.label: Odoo manifest references remote frontend assets
manifest_remote_asset_supply_chain.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

manifest_path_integrity.label: Odoo manifest references local paths that may escape the module tree

manifest_risky_dependency.label: Odoo manifest declares dependencies with security-sensitive usage

view_inheritance_broad_security_xpath.label: Inherited view uses broad XPath against security-sensitive buttons or fields

view_inheritance_group_relaxation.label: Inherited view removes groups or exposes sensitive controls to public or portal users

view_inheritance_object_button_exposure.label: Inherited view adds or replaces object-method buttons without preserving authorization posture

view_inheritance_sensitive_field_exposur.label: Inherited view reveals, replaces, or inserts sensitive fields without sufficient UI restrictions

model_sensitive_display_name.label: Odoo model display name is backed by a sensitive field

model_delegated_inheritance_exposure.label: Delegated inheritance can expose sensitive delegated model fields through wrapper ACLs

model_delegated_link_integrity.label: Delegated inheritance link is missing, optional, or lacks cascade semantics

model_secret_persistence.label: Secret-like model field can be copied into duplicated records

model_audit_metadata_disabled.label: Odoo model disables create/write audit metadata maintenance
model_audit_metadata_disabled.owasp: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

model_manual_sql_storage.label: Odoo model uses manually managed SQL storage or views

model_identifier_uniqueness.label: Required business identifier lacks an obvious uniqueness constraint

model_monetary_currency_integrity.label: Monetary field lacks an explicit currency field or model currency

model_method_dynamic_evaluation.label: Odoo lifecycle model method performs dynamic evaluation

model_method_sensitive_model_mutation.label: Odoo lifecycle model method mutates a sensitive model

model_method_elevated_mutation.label: Odoo lifecycle model method mutates records through sudo or superuser context

model_method_http_without_timeout.label: Odoo lifecycle model method performs outbound HTTP without an explicit timeout

model_method_tls_verification_disabled.label: Odoo lifecycle model method disables TLS verification for outbound HTTP

model_method_cleartext_http_url.label: Odoo lifecycle model method uses cleartext HTTP transport

constraint_sudo_visibility_gap.label: Odoo constraint validates through sudo and may hide record-rule or company visibility issues

constraint_unbounded_search.label: Odoo constraint performs an unbounded search during validation

constraint_singleton_assumption.label: Odoo constraint assumes a singleton recordset during batch validation

constraint_ineffective_return.label: Odoo constraint returns a value instead of raising ValidationError

constraint_registration_gap.label: Odoo constraint decorator may not register or trigger for intended fields

access_override_sudo_search.label: Odoo search override reads through sudo or superuser context

access_override_missing_super.label: Odoo access override does not call super and may drop base ACL or record-rule checks

access_override_allow_all.label: Odoo access override returns allow-all without preserving inherited checks

access_override_filter_self.label: Odoo record-rule filter override returns self and bypasses filtering

record_rule_universal_sensitive_domain.label: Odoo record rule grants a universal domain on a sensitive or security model

record_rule_public_sensitive_no_owner_sc.label: Odoo public or portal record rule on a sensitive model lacks owner, token, or company scope

record_rule_public_company_only_scope.label: Odoo public or portal record rule on a sensitive model relies only on company scope

record_rule_portal_sensitive_mutation.label: Odoo public or portal record rule allows write, create, or delete on a sensitive model

record_rule_global_sensitive_mutation.label: Odoo global record rule allows mutation on a sensitive model without group scoping

record_rule_domain_group_logic.label: Odoo record-rule domain embeds group logic inside domain_force

record_rule_context_dependent_domain.label: Odoo record-rule domain depends on caller-controlled context

record_rule_company_hierarchy_expansion.label: Odoo record rule expands access through company hierarchy with child_of

record_rule_empty_permissions.label: Odoo record rule disables every permission and may be ineffective or misleading

button_action_sensitive_model_mutation.label: Odoo button or action method mutates a sensitive model

button_action_sudo_mutation.label: Odoo button or action method mutates records through sudo or superuser context

button_action_sensitive_state_write.label: Odoo button or action method writes approval, payment, posting, or workflow state

button_action_unlink_no_access_check.label: Odoo button or action method deletes records without a visible access or group guard

button_action_mutation_no_access_check.label: Odoo button or action method performs sensitive mutation without a visible access or group guard

view_domain_sensitive_action_broad_domai.label: Odoo act_window for a sensitive model uses a broad domain without groups

view_domain_global_sensitive_filter_broa.label: Odoo global saved filter applies a broad domain to a sensitive model

view_domain_global_default_sensitive_fil.label: Odoo global default saved filter affects a sensitive model

view_domain_dynamic_evaluation.label: Odoo XML domain or context performs dynamic evaluation

view_context_active_test_disabled.label: Odoo XML context disables active_test and can include inactive records

view_context_company_scope_control.label: Odoo XML context sets company scope from active, user, or context values

view_context_privileged_default.label: Odoo XML context defaults privileged, company, user, or portal/share-sensitive fields

view_context_default_groups.label: Odoo XML context defaults user or group assignment fields

view_context_risky_framework_flag.label: Odoo XML context enables framework flags that bypass tracking, password reset, install, uninstall, or accounting safeguards

xml_data_core_xmlid_override.label: Odoo XML data overrides a core module external ID
xml_data_core_xmlid_override.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

xml_data_core_xmlid_delete.label: Odoo XML data deletes a core module external ID
xml_data_core_xmlid_delete.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

xml_data_sensitive_noupdate.label: Odoo sensitive XML data operation is protected by noupdate and may not receive future fixes
xml_data_sensitive_noupdate.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

xml_data_forcecreate_disabled.label: Odoo XML record disables forcecreate so missing security or configuration data is not recreated
xml_data_forcecreate_disabled.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

xml_data_manual_model_data_write.label: Odoo XML data writes ir.model.data directly and can hijack XML ID ownership or update semantics
xml_data_manual_model_data_write.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

xml_data_sensitive_delete.label: Odoo XML data deletes security-sensitive records during install or update
xml_data_sensitive_delete.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

xml_data_sensitive_search_delete.label: Odoo XML data search-deletes security-sensitive records with a broad or version-dependent domain
xml_data_sensitive_search_delete.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

xml_data_sensitive_function_mutation.label: Odoo XML function mutates security-sensitive records during install or update
xml_data_sensitive_function_mutation.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

xml_data_group_privilege_implication.label: Odoo XML data makes one group imply a privileged group

xml_data_user_admin_group_assignment.label: Odoo XML data assigns users to privileged groups

xml_data_function_security_model_mutatio.label: Odoo XML function mutates security model records
xml_data_function_security_model_mutatio.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

xml_data_public_mail_channel.label: Odoo XML data exposes a mail channel publicly

xml_data_server_action_tls_verification_.label: Odoo XML server action disables TLS verification for outbound HTTP

xml_data_server_action_cleartext_http_ur.label: Odoo XML server action uses cleartext HTTP transport

ui_action_without_groups.label: Odoo UI action or object button lacks explicit groups

ui_public_object_button.label: Odoo object button is exposed to public or portal users

ui_sensitive_action_without_groups.label: Odoo sensitive action, button, or menu lacks explicit groups

ui_sensitive_action_external_groups.label: Odoo sensitive action, button, or menu is exposed to public or portal users

metadata_public_write_acl.label: Odoo metadata grants public or portal groups write, create, or delete ACL permissions

metadata_sensitive_public_read_acl.label: Odoo metadata grants public or portal groups read ACLs on sensitive models

metadata_group_privilege_escalation.label: Odoo group metadata implies admin or internal-user privileges

metadata_user_group_assignment.label: Odoo user metadata assigns admin or internal-user groups

metadata_sensitive_field_exposure.label: Odoo field metadata exposes sensitive fields through public groups or missing groups

metadata_sensitive_field_writable.label: Odoo field metadata makes sensitive fields writable

metadata_dynamic_compute_code.label: Odoo field metadata contains dynamic compute code

migration_lifecycle_hook_review.label: Odoo manifest lifecycle hook requires install or uninstall side-effect review

migration_missing_lifecycle_hook.label: Odoo manifest lifecycle hook function is missing and may skip security setup

migration_interpolated_sql.label: Odoo migration or lifecycle hook executes interpolated SQL

migration_destructive_sql.label: Odoo migration or lifecycle hook executes destructive SQL
migration_destructive_sql.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

migration_sudo_mutation.label: Odoo migration or lifecycle hook performs elevated record mutation

migration_manual_transaction.label: Odoo migration or lifecycle hook manually commits or rolls back transactions
migration_manual_transaction.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

migration_http_without_timeout.label: Odoo migration or lifecycle hook performs outbound HTTP without timeout

migration_tls_verification_disabled.label: Odoo migration or lifecycle hook disables TLS verification for outbound HTTP

migration_cleartext_http_url.label: Odoo migration or lifecycle hook uses cleartext HTTP transport

migration_process_execution.label: Odoo migration or lifecycle hook executes a subprocess

module_lifecycle_public_route.label: Odoo public route can install, upgrade, or uninstall modules

module_lifecycle_sudo_operation.label: Odoo module lifecycle operation runs through sudo or superuser context

module_lifecycle_immediate_operation.label: Odoo immediate module lifecycle operation can alter installed code, data, and registry state
module_lifecycle_immediate_operation.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

module_lifecycle_tainted_selection.label: Odoo module lifecycle operation uses request-derived module selection

automation_broad_sensitive_trigger.label: Odoo automated action runs broadly on a sensitive model

automation_dynamic_eval.label: Odoo automated action performs dynamic Python evaluation

automation_sudo_mutation.label: Odoo automated action mutates records through sudo or superuser context

automation_sudo_method_call.label: Odoo automated action calls workflow methods through sudo or superuser context

automation_sensitive_model_mutation.label: Odoo automated action mutates security, identity, payment, attachment, or configuration models

automation_http_without_timeout.label: Odoo automated action performs outbound HTTP without timeout

automation_tls_verification_disabled.label: Odoo automated action disables TLS verification for outbound HTTP

automation_cleartext_http_url.label: Odoo automated action uses cleartext HTTP transport

scheduled_job_elevated_mutation.label: Odoo scheduled job mutates records through sudo or superuser context

scheduled_job_elevated_method_call.label: Odoo scheduled job calls workflow methods through sudo or superuser context

scheduled_job_sensitive_model_mutation.label: Odoo scheduled job mutates security, identity, payment, attachment, or runtime configuration models

scheduled_job_dynamic_evaluation.label: Odoo scheduled job performs dynamic evaluation

scheduled_job_manual_transaction.label: Odoo scheduled job manually commits or rolls back transactions

scheduled_job_unbounded_search.label: Odoo scheduled job performs unbounded ORM searches

scheduled_job_http_without_timeout.label: Odoo scheduled job performs outbound HTTP without an explicit timeout

scheduled_job_tls_verification_disabled.label: Odoo scheduled job disables TLS verification for outbound HTTP

scheduled_job_cleartext_http_url.label: Odoo scheduled job uses cleartext HTTP transport

scheduled_job_sync_without_limit.label: Odoo scheduled sync or import job lacks a visible batch limit

xml_cron_admin_user.label: Odoo ir.cron is configured to execute as admin or root

xml_cron_root_code.label: Odoo ir.cron executes Python code as admin or root

xml_cron_http_without_timeout.label: Odoo ir.cron code performs outbound HTTP without a visible timeout

xml_cron_tls_verification_disabled.label: Odoo ir.cron code disables TLS verification for outbound HTTP

xml_cron_cleartext_http_url.label: Odoo ir.cron code uses cleartext HTTP transport

xml_cron_doall_enabled.label: Odoo ir.cron catches up missed executions with doall=True

xml_cron_short_interval.label: Odoo ir.cron runs at a very short interval

xml_cron_external_sync_review.label: Odoo ir.cron appears to perform external sync without visible guardrails

queue_job_missing_identity_key.label: Odoo delayed job enqueue lacks an identity key for idempotency

queue_job_public_enqueue.label: Odoo public route enqueues a background job

queue_job_elevated_mutation.label: Odoo queue job mutates records through sudo or superuser context

queue_job_elevated_method_call.label: Odoo queue job calls workflow methods through sudo or superuser context

queue_job_sensitive_model_mutation.label: Odoo queue job mutates security, identity, payment, attachment, or runtime configuration models

queue_job_dynamic_evaluation.label: Odoo queue job performs dynamic evaluation

queue_job_http_without_timeout.label: Odoo queue job performs outbound HTTP without an explicit timeout

queue_job_tls_verification_disabled.label: Odoo queue job disables TLS verification for outbound HTTP

queue_job_cleartext_http_url.label: Odoo queue job uses cleartext HTTP transport

serialization_unsafe_deserialization.label: Odoo addon deserializes pickle-backed or object-capable data
serialization_unsafe_deserialization.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

serialization_unsafe_yaml_load.label: Odoo addon uses YAML loading that can construct arbitrary Python objects
serialization_unsafe_yaml_load.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

serialization_yaml_full_load.label: Odoo addon uses YAML full_load on addon, request, attachment, or integration data
serialization_yaml_full_load.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

serialization_literal_eval_tainted.label: Odoo addon parses request, attachment, or integration data with literal_eval

serialization_json_load_without_size_che.label: Odoo addon parses request, attachment, or integration JSON without visible size limits

serialization_xml_fromstring_tainted.label: Odoo addon parses request or attachment XML without hardened parser controls

serialization_unsafe_xml_parser.label: Odoo addon enables unsafe XML parser options for DTD, entity, network, or huge-tree behavior

wizard_binary_import_field.label: Odoo TransientModel wizard exposes binary upload or import input

wizard_sensitive_model_mutation.label: Odoo wizard mutates sensitive security, identity, payment, or configuration models

wizard_sudo_mutation.label: Odoo wizard mutates records through sudo or superuser context

wizard_upload_parser.label: Odoo wizard parses uploaded file content without complete parser-hardening evidence

wizard_dynamic_active_model.label: Odoo wizard uses context active_model to dynamically select an environment model

wizard_active_ids_bulk_mutation.label: Odoo wizard mutates records selected from context active_ids

wizard_mutation_no_access_check.label: Odoo wizard action mutates records without visible access or group checks

wizard_long_transient_retention.label: Odoo TransientModel wizard retains temporary records longer than expected

wizard_upload_parser_no_size_check.label: Odoo wizard parses uploaded content without visible size limits

settings_sensitive_config_field_no_admin.label: Odoo settings field stores sensitive config without admin-only groups

settings_config_field_public_groups.label: Odoo settings field exposes config parameters to public or portal groups

settings_security_toggle_no_admin_groups.label: Odoo security-sensitive setting lacks admin-only groups

settings_security_toggle_unsafe_default.label: Odoo security-sensitive setting defaults to unsafe posture

settings_implies_admin_group.label: Odoo settings toggle grants or implies administrator groups

settings_module_toggle_no_admin_groups.label: Odoo settings module install toggle lacks admin-only groups

settings_elevated_config_write.label: Odoo settings method writes config parameters through sudo or superuser context

signup_public_token_route.label: Odoo public signup or reset route handles account recovery tokens

signup_tainted_reset_trigger.label: Odoo signup or reset helper is triggered by request-derived data

signup_tainted_token_lookup.label: Odoo identity lookup uses request-derived signup, reset, or access tokens

signup_token_lookup_without_expiry.label: Odoo signup or reset token lookup lacks visible expiry enforcement

signup_tainted_identity_token_write.label: Odoo request-derived data mutates signup, access token, or password fields

signup_public_sudo_identity_flow.label: Odoo public signup or reset flow reads or mutates identity records through sudo

signup_token_exposed_public_route.label: Odoo public signup or reset response exposes reusable account takeover tokens

identity_public_route_mutation.label: Public or unauthenticated Odoo route mutates users or groups

identity_elevated_mutation.label: Odoo user or group mutation runs through sudo or superuser context

identity_request_derived_mutation.label: Request-derived data reaches Odoo user or group mutation

identity_privilege_field_write.label: Odoo identity mutation writes privilege-bearing fields

loose_python_eval_exec.label: Server action or loose Python script calls eval or exec

loose_python_safe_eval.label: Server action or loose Python script calls safe_eval

loose_python_sudo_write.label: Server action or loose Python script performs sudo write/create/unlink

loose_python_sudo_method_call.label: Server action or loose Python script calls workflow methods through sudo or superuser

loose_python_sensitive_model_mutation.label: Server action or loose Python script mutates a sensitive model

loose_python_manual_transaction.label: Server action or loose Python script manually commits or rolls back transactions

loose_python_http_no_timeout.label: Server action or loose Python script performs outbound HTTP without timeout

loose_python_tls_verification_disabled.label: Server action or loose Python script disables TLS verification for outbound HTTP

loose_python_cleartext_http_url.label: Server action or loose Python script uses cleartext HTTP transport

loose_python_sql_injection.label: Server action or loose Python script builds raw SQL through interpolation

oauth_public_callback_route.label: OAuth/OIDC callback route is public and needs explicit state, nonce, provider, and redirect binding

oauth_missing_state_nonce.label: OAuth/OIDC callback lacks state or nonce binding

oauth_http_without_timeout.label: OAuth/OIDC token or userinfo HTTP validation lacks a timeout

oauth_tls_verification_disabled.label: OAuth/OIDC token or userinfo HTTP validation disables TLS certificate verification

oauth_tainted_validation_url.label: Request-derived data controls OAuth/OIDC token or userinfo validation URL

oauth_tainted_redirect_uri.label: Request-derived OAuth/OIDC redirect URI is forwarded during token exchange

oauth_jwt_verification_disabled.label: OAuth/OIDC JWT decode disables signature or claim verification

oauth_request_token_decode.label: Request-derived OAuth/OIDC token is decoded and needs constrained issuer, audience, nonce, expiry, algorithm, and key selection

oauth_token_exchange_missing_pkce.label: OAuth/OIDC authorization-code token exchange lacks a visible PKCE code verifier

oauth_tainted_identity_write.label: Request-derived OAuth/OIDC identity data reaches res.users mutation

oauth_session_authenticate.label: OAuth/OIDC flow creates a session and needs state, nonce, and provider identity binding before authentication

session_public_authenticate.label: Public or unauthenticated controller authenticates a session with request-controlled credentials

session_public_user_lookup.label: Public or unauthenticated route looks up users from request-controlled input before authentication

session_direct_uid_assignment.label: Controller directly mutates request.session.uid and can enable session fixation or account switching

session_direct_request_uid_assignment.label: Controller directly mutates request.uid outside the normal Odoo authentication boundary

session_update_env_superuser.label: Controller switches the active request environment to a superuser identity

session_update_env_tainted_user.label: Controller switches the active request environment using a request-controlled user

session_public_update_env.label: Public or unauthenticated route switches the active request environment

session_environment_superuser.label: Manual Odoo Environment construction uses a superuser identity

session_environment_tainted_user.label: Manual Odoo Environment construction uses a request-controlled user

session_logout_weak_route.label: Logout or session-reset route has weak method or CSRF protection

session_token_exposed.label: Controller response exposes session, CSRF, or token material

session_ir_http_auth_override.label: ir.http authentication boundary is overridden and must preserve Odoo authentication guarantees

session_ir_http_superuser_auth.label: ir.http authentication override grants a superuser or administrator identity

session_ir_http_bypass.label: ir.http authentication override appears to bypass login, API-key, or session validation

session_cookie_weak_flags.label: Session, CSRF, or token cookie lacks Secure, HttpOnly, or SameSite restrictions

sensitive_cookie_cacheable_response.label: Response setting a session, CSRF, or token cookie can be cached

cache_public_sensitive_response.label: Public sensitive response lacks no-store or private cache-control

cache_public_sensitive_render.label: Public rendered response includes token or secret-like data without visible cache hardening

cache_public_file_download.label: Public sensitive file download may be cacheable by browsers or proxies

cache_public_cacheable_sensitive_route.label: Public sensitive route explicitly sets cacheable Cache-Control headers

orm_domain_tainted_sudo_search.label: Odoo ORM search uses a request or context-controlled domain through sudo or superuser

orm_domain_tainted_search.label: Odoo ORM search uses a request or context-controlled domain

orm_domain_dynamic_evaluation.label: Odoo ORM domain construction evaluates request or context-controlled data

orm_domain_filtered_dynamic_logic.label: Odoo record filtering uses request, env, context, or sudo logic instead of durable access controls

domain_injection.label: search/read domain built from request.params without validation

json_route_record_idor.label: JSON route uses request-controlled IDs or domains to select records

json_route_public_auth.label: Public or unauthenticated JSON route exposes RPC-style functionality

json_route_csrf_disabled.label: JSON route explicitly disables CSRF protection

json_route_sudo_mutation.label: JSON route mutates records through sudo or superuser context

json_route_public_sudo_read.label: Public JSON route reads records through sudo or superuser context

json_route_mass_assignment.label: JSON route passes request-derived data into ORM mutations

json_route_tainted_domain.label: JSON route uses request-controlled ORM search domains

payment_public_callback_no_signature.label: Public payment callback lacks visible provider signature or HMAC validation

payment_weak_signature_compare.label: Payment webhook compares provider signatures without constant-time comparison

payment_state_without_validation.label: Payment notification changes transaction state without visible signature or reference validation

payment_state_without_reconciliation.label: Payment notification finalizes state without amount and currency reconciliation

payment_state_without_idempotency.label: Payment notification changes transaction state without an idempotency or duplicate-event guard

payment_transaction_lookup_weak.label: Payment transaction lookup lacks provider and provider-reference scoping

publication_sensitive_public_attachment.label: Sensitive-looking ir.attachment record is explicitly world-readable

publication_sensitive_website_published.label: Sensitive model record is marked website-published

publication_portal_share_sensitive.label: Portal/share wizard targets sensitive records or generated public links

publication_sensitive_default_published.label: Sensitive model defaults records to a website-published state

publication_public_route_mutation.label: Public or unauthenticated route changes website publication flags on sensitive records

attachment_public_route_mutation.label: Public or unauthenticated route mutates ir.attachment records

attachment_sudo_mutation.label: ir.attachment mutation runs through sudo or a superuser identity

attachment_tainted_res_model.label: Request-derived res_model controls ir.attachment creation binding

attachment_tainted_res_id.label: Request-derived res_id controls ir.attachment creation binding

attachment_public_orphan.label: Public ir.attachment is created without both res_model and res_id record binding

attachment_public_sensitive_binding.label: Public ir.attachment is bound to a sensitive model

attachment_public_write.label: ir.attachment write makes an existing file public

attachment_tainted_res_model_write.label: Request-derived res_model rebinding reaches ir.attachment write

attachment_tainted_res_id_write.label: Request-derived res_id rebinding reaches ir.attachment write

attachment_tainted_access_token_write.label: Request-derived access_token is written to ir.attachment

file_upload_tainted_path_write.label: Request-controlled upload path is used for filesystem write, copy, or move

file_upload_base64_decode.label: Request-derived base64 upload data is decoded before size, type, and destination validation

file_upload_attachment_from_request.label: ir.attachment is created from request-derived upload data

file_upload_public_attachment_create.label: Uploaded content is stored as a public ir.attachment

file_upload_archive_extraction.label: Uploaded or untrusted archive extraction can write outside the intended directory

file_upload_secure_filename_only.label: Upload path validation relies on secure_filename without destination, extension, content type, uniqueness, or overwrite controls

file_upload_unsafe_tempfile.label: Upload flow uses tempfile.mktemp and creates predictable race-prone paths

binary_attachment_data_response.label: Controller returns ir.attachment or binary field data directly

binary_content_sudo.label: ir.http.binary_content is called through sudo or a superuser identity

binary_tainted_content_args.label: Request-derived model, record, or field selectors reach ir.http.binary_content

binary_tainted_web_content_redirect.label: Request-derived data builds a /web/content or /web/image redirect URL

binary_tainted_content_disposition.label: Request-derived filename reaches Content-Disposition download headers

publication_sensitive_runtime_published.label: Runtime code changes publication flags on sensitive records

publication_tainted_runtime_published.label: Request-derived data controls publication flags on sensitive records

payment_webhook_integrity.label: Payment webhook or callback can be forged, replayed, mismatched, or bound to the wrong transaction

api_key_credential_exposure.label: API key material is created, stored, looked up, or returned through unsafe code paths

api_key_xml_record.label: Odoo module data declares res.users.apikeys records

api_key_csv_record.label: Odoo CSV data declares res.users.apikeys records

api_key_public_route_mutation.label: Public or unauthenticated route can create, rename, or revoke API keys

api_key_sudo_mutation.label: API key mutation runs through sudo or superuser context

api_key_request_derived_mutation.label: Request-derived data reaches API key create, write, or unlink calls

api_key_tainted_lookup.label: Request-derived data searches API key records

runtime_config_security_misconfiguration.label: Runtime configuration changes weaken Odoo security or external link integrity

config_parameter_security_toggle_write.label: ir.config_parameter writes enable or accept request-controlled security-sensitive toggles

config_parameter_base_url_write.label: ir.config_parameter writes request-controlled or insecure web.base.url values

config_parameter_sensitive_read.label: Sensitive ir.config_parameter values are read from public or elevated code paths

config_parameter_tainted_access.label: Request-controlled data selects or writes ir.config_parameter keys or values

config_parameter_secret_default.label: Sensitive ir.config_parameter values use deployable literal defaults or hardcoded writes

config_parameter_elevated_write.label: ir.config_parameter writes use sudo or superuser context

controller_sensitive_response_exposure.label: Controller response exposes token, API key, password, or secret-shaped data

controller_open_redirect.label: Controller redirects to a request-controlled URL

controller_cors_wildcard_origin.label: Controller response allows cross-origin reads from any origin

controller_response_header_injection.label: Controller response headers include request-controlled data

controller_weak_csp_header.label: Controller sets a weak Content-Security-Policy header

controller_weak_frame_options.label: Controller sets a weak X-Frame-Options header

controller_weak_referrer_policy.label: Controller sets a weak Referrer-Policy header

controller_weak_hsts_header.label: Controller sets a weak Strict-Transport-Security header

controller_weak_cross_origin_policy.label: Controller sets weak cross-origin isolation headers

controller_weak_permissions_policy.label: Controller sets a weak Permissions-Policy or Feature-Policy header

controller_tainted_html_response.label: Controller returns request-derived data as an HTML response

controller_jsonp_callback_response.label: Controller returns request-controlled JSONP callback responses

controller_tainted_cookie.label: Controller sets cookie names or values from request-controlled data

controller_cookie_missing_security_flags.label: Controller sets cookies without Secure, HttpOnly, or SameSite flags

controller_tainted_file_response.label: Controller file responses or offload headers use request-controlled filesystem paths

orm_context_active_test_disabled.label: Odoo ORM context disables active record filtering and can include inactive records

orm_context_sudo_active_test_read.label: Odoo privileged ORM read disables active record filtering

orm_context_privileged_mode.label: Odoo ORM context enables install or uninstall framework modes

orm_context_privileged_default.label: Odoo ORM context seeds privilege-bearing default values

orm_context_request_active_test_disabled.label: Odoo request context disables active record filtering for later route work

orm_context_request_tracking_disabled.label: Odoo request context disables chatter, tracking, or subscription audit behavior

orm_context_request_notification_disable.label: Odoo request context suppresses account, password, or mail notifications

orm_context_request_privileged_mode.label: Odoo request context enables privileged framework mode for later ORM work

orm_context_request_privileged_default.label: Odoo request context seeds privilege-bearing defaults for later create flows

orm_context_tracking_disabled_mutation.label: Odoo ORM mutation disables chatter, tracking, or subscription audit behavior
orm_context_tracking_disabled_mutation.owasp: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

orm_context_notification_disabled_mutati.label: Odoo ORM mutation suppresses account, password, or mail notifications
orm_context_notification_disabled_mutati.owasp: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

orm_context_privileged_mode_mutation.label: Odoo ORM mutation runs with privileged install or uninstall framework modes

orm_context_privileged_default_mutation.label: Odoo ORM mutation uses privilege-bearing default context values

action_window_sensitive_exposure.label: ir.actions.act_window exposes sensitive models through public routes or broad domains

action_window_privileged_context.label: ir.actions.act_window context seeds privileged defaults or archived-record visibility

action_window_tainted_definition.label: ir.actions.act_window model, domain, or context is request-controlled

action_url_external_navigation.label: ir.actions.act_url exposes external navigation through broad or public triggers

action_url_public_route.label: Public route returns or mutates ir.actions.act_url navigation

action_url_external_no_groups.label: External ir.actions.act_url declaration lacks groups restriction

action_url_external_new_window.label: External ir.actions.act_url opens in a new window

action_url_unsafe_scheme.label: ir.actions.act_url uses executable or local-file URL scheme

action_url_sensitive_url_material.label: ir.actions.act_url embeds token or secret-like material in navigable URLs

database_listing_exposure.label: Controller exposes available Odoo database names

database_manager_exposure.label: Controller exposes Odoo database manager create/drop/backup/restore operations

database_tainted_selection.label: Request-controlled data selects or filters the active Odoo database

database_tainted_management_input.label: Request-controlled data reaches Odoo database manager operations

database_session_selection.label: Controller assigns request-controlled values to request.session.db

outbound_integration_credential_forwardi.label: Outbound integration forwards request-derived Authorization, API key, or HTTP auth material

integration_hardcoded_auth_header.label: Outbound integration sends a hardcoded Authorization, API key, cookie, or token header

integration_hardcoded_http_auth.label: Outbound integration sends hardcoded HTTP auth credentials

integration_http_no_timeout.label: Outbound integration HTTP call lacks an explicit timeout

integration_tls_verify_disabled.label: Outbound integration HTTP call disables TLS certificate verification

integration_cleartext_http_url.label: Outbound integration uses cleartext HTTP transport

integration_tainted_url_ssrf.label: Outbound integration URL is request-controlled and can reach unintended hosts

integration_tainted_proxy.label: Outbound integration proxy configuration is request-controlled

integration_internal_url_ssrf.label: Outbound integration targets a loopback, private, link-local, or metadata URL

integration_os_command_execution.label: Integration flow invokes shell-based OS command execution

integration_tainted_command_args.label: Request-derived data reaches integration process command or arguments

integration_process_no_timeout.label: Integration process execution lacks an explicit timeout

integration_report_command_review.label: External report or document converter command requires path, timeout, and sandbox review

realtime_channel_subscription_authorizat.label: Realtime bus subscription accepts broad or request-controlled channels

realtime_public_route_bus_send.label: Public route sends realtime bus notifications

realtime_bus_send_sudo.label: Realtime bus notification is sent through elevated environment

realtime_broad_or_tainted_channel.label: Realtime bus notification targets broad or request-controlled channel

realtime_sensitive_payload.label: Realtime bus payload may expose sensitive fields to unauthorized recipients

realtime_notification_sudo.label: Notification or message call is sent through elevated environment

realtime_bus_channel_authorization.label: Realtime bus channels or payloads can expose notifications to unauthorized subscribers

website_form_route_csrf_disabled.label: Website form route disables CSRF protection for public model creation or mutation

website_form_public_model_create.label: Website form posts directly to Odoo model creation

website_form_sensitive_field.label: Website form exposes sensitive model fields to public submitters

website_form_file_upload.label: Public website form accepts file uploads

website_form_missing_csrf_token.label: Website form posts to model creation without a visible CSRF token

website_form_hidden_model_selector.label: Website form carries model or field metadata in client-controlled hidden inputs

website_form_sanitize_disabled.label: Website form disables input sanitization for public submitted content

website_form_external_success_redirect.label: Website form redirects successful submissions to an external URL

website_form_dynamic_success_redirect.label: Website form builds successful submission redirect targets from request data

website_form_dangerous_success_redirect.label: Website form redirects successful submissions to an executable or local-file URL scheme

website_form_field_allowlisted_sensitive.label: Sensitive model field is explicitly allowlisted for website form submissions

website_form_public_record_mutation.label: Public website forms can create or mutate model records without sufficient CSRF, field, or model restrictions

sensitive_model_mutation.label: Code mutates security, identity, payment, attachment, or runtime configuration models

export_spreadsheet_formula_injection.label: CSV or XLSX export writes unsanitized record or request data that can become spreadsheet formulas

export_tainted_formula.label: XLSX formula expression is built from request or record data

export_request_controlled_fields.label: ORM export or read field list is request-controlled instead of server-side allowlisted

export_sensitive_fields.label: ORM export or read includes sensitive identity, credential, payment, or access-control fields

sensitive_model_default_export.label: Sensitive model read/export uses default fields instead of an explicit allowlist

default_public_route_set.label: Public or unauthenticated route writes persisted ir.default values

default_sudo_set.label: Privileged context writes persisted ir.default values without explicit scope controls

default_request_derived_set.label: Request-derived field or value reaches ir.default.set

default_sensitive_field_set.label: Runtime ir.default.set writes sensitive privilege, company, accounting, pricing, or identity fields

default_sensitive_model_set.label: Runtime ir.default.set seeds defaults for sensitive security, identity, payment, or runtime configuration models

default_global_scope.label: ir.default record has global scope across users or companies

default_sensitive_value.label: XML ir.default data preconfigures sensitive privilege, company, accounting, pricing, or identity fields

default_sensitive_model_value.label: XML ir.default data preconfigures defaults for sensitive security, identity, payment, or runtime configuration models

sequence_public_route_next.label: Public or unauthenticated route consumes an ir.sequence counter

sequence_tainted_code.label: Request-derived input controls the ir.sequence code being consumed

sequence_sensitive_code_use.label: Security-sensitive flow uses predictable ir.sequence values

sequence_sensitive_declaration.label: ir.sequence declaration appears to generate security tokens, reset codes, coupons, invites, or secrets

sensitive_model_default_configuration.label: ir.default seeds sensitive security, identity, payment, or runtime configuration models

sensitive_model_public_exposure.label: Sensitive model records, attachments, shares, or followers are exposed to public or notification surfaces

ssrf_outbound_request.label: requests.get / urllib URL controlled by user input

path_traversal_attachment.label: ir.attachment / file path joined with user input without normalize

hardcoded_secret.label: API key / password / token committed to source

secret_hardcoded_value.label: Secret-like literal is committed in source code

secret_config_parameter_code_value.label: Code writes committed secret values into ir.config_parameter

secret_config_parameter_xml_value.label: Module XML data commits sensitive ir.config_parameter values

secret_weak_user_password_data.label: Module XML data commits weak res.users passwords

secret_user_password_data.label: Module XML data commits reusable res.users passwords

secret_weak_admin_passwd.label: Odoo database manager master password is weak or placeholder-like

secret_config_file_value.label: Odoo config file commits environment secret values

secrets_in_logs.label: Secrets / PII written to ir.logging or _logger

deserialize_user_input.label: pickle / marshal / yaml.load on attacker bytes
deserialize_user_input.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

mass_assignment.label: create/write accepts arbitrary fields from request

ir_rule_global_bypass.label: Record rule scoped to global=True opens cross-company read

external_id_xml_id_clobber.label: Module overwrites external ID owned by another module

race_condition_state.label: Stage transition / approval check vulnerable to TOCTOU

deployment_security_misconfiguration.label: Odoo deployment or runtime configuration weakens production security controls

deployment_oauth_validation_missing.label: Odoo OAuth provider lacks a validation endpoint for token and identity checks

deployment_oauth_insecure_endpoint.label: Odoo OAuth provider uses insecure HTTP endpoints

deployment_committed_secret.label: Odoo deployment commits OAuth or database-manager secrets

deployment_weak_master_password.label: Odoo database manager master password is weak, empty, or placeholder-like

deployment_dev_or_test_mode.label: Odoo deployment enables developer or test modes in production configuration

deployment_database_manager_exposure.label: Odoo deployment exposes database listing or database manager create/drop operations

deployment_dbfilter_weak.label: Odoo dbfilter allows unintended database selection

deployment_proxy_mode_disabled.label: Odoo proxy_mode is disabled behind reverse-proxy style deployment

deployment_database_tls_weak.label: Odoo database TLS mode is disabled or opportunistic

deployment_worker_limits_weak.label: Odoo deployment lacks worker isolation or execution time limits

deployment_debug_logging.label: Odoo deployment enables debug logging that can expose sensitive data

deployment_base_url_integrity.label: Odoo deployment allows generated-link poisoning or insecure base URLs

deployment_open_signup.label: Odoo deployment enables broad public or OAuth account self-registration
